title: Darrius Modpack 1-3: Remastered
description: A Create and Origins(++) modpack with QoL mods and extra terrain generation features.
body:
## [New modpack version! This one has less mods, less lag :\]](/modpack/darrius-reborn)
## NO LONGER MAINTAINED
This version of Darrius is not maintained, as I have no reason; use version four instead. If you really want this version maintained, [drop an issue on the GitHub of Darrius Modpack: Reborn](https://github.com/squid1127/Darrius-Modpack-Reborn/issues)
## About (v3)
A modpack created for modded use with servers, featuring [Origins++](/mod/origins-plus-plus), [Create](/mod/create-fabric), and [Terralith](/mod/terralith). Uses fabric. I will be using this on various servers of my own. This modpack features a lot of client-side improvements, including the inclusion of [Simply Optimized](/modpack/sop), great for not-so-powerful comps! We also have QoL mods such as [Xaero's Minimap](/mod/xaeros-minimap) and [Panda's Falling Tree's](/mod/pandas-falling-trees). [Better Combat](/mod/better-combat) also included

## Main Mods
- [Farmer's Delight](/mod/farmers-delight-fabric)
- [Origins++](/mod/origins-plus-plus)
- [Terralith](/mod/terralith)
- [Ad Astra](/mod/ad-astra)
- [Create](/mod/create-fabric)
- [Creeper Overhaul](/mod/creeper-overhaul)
- [More Mob Variants](/mod/more-mob-variants)
- [Panda's Falling Tree's](/mod/pandas-falling-trees)
- [Waystones](/mod/waystones)
- [Better Combat](/mod/better-combat)
- Client-side qol mods, such as [Xaero's Minimap](/mod/xaeros-minimap)

## Server Usage
This modpack was designed for clients, so you might want to add some additional server management mods, etc.
